en: :[name=\n[1]]:It seems there was nothing after all.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:

es: :[name=\n[1]]:El armario está organizado de forma muy práctica.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:

en: :[name=\n[1]]:A small wooden drawer. It contains various household items.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
es: :[name=\n[1]]:Un pequeño cajón de madera. Contiene varios artículos del hogar.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:

en: :[name=\n[1]]:The flowers appear healthy despite the cave air.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
es: :[name=\n[1]]:Las flores parecen sanas a pesar del aire de la cueva.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
:[name=\n[1]]:Aunque pulido, aún se aprecian las marcas de batalla.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:

en: :[name=\n[1]]:Countless tools and weapons must have been forged upon it.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
es: :[name=\n[1]]:Innumerables herramientas debieron haber sido forjadas en ella.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:

en: :[name=\n[1]]:The metal reflects a warm orange glow.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
:[name=\n[1]]:The heat radiating from it fills the entire forge.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
es: :[name=\n[1]]:El calor que irradia llena toda la fragua.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:

en: :[name=\n[1]]:Cold ashes rest at the bottom of the furnace.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
es: :[name=\n[1]]:Cenizas frías reposan en el fondo del horno.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:

en: :[name=\n[1]]:A polished suit of armor stands outside the forge.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
es: :[name=\n[1]]:Una armadura pulida se encuentra fuera de la forja.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:

en: :[name=\n[1]]:Perhaps it was placed here to display the blacksmith's craftsmanship.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
es: :[name=\n[1]]:Quizás se colocó aquí para mostrar la maestría del herrero.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:

en: :[name=\n[1]]:This must be one of Durgan's finest works.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
es: :[name=\n[1]]:Esta debe ser de las mejores obras de Durgan.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
